calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-11-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Defendant/Appellant, Aria Razban appeared on her own behalf, represented by Tia Paquan (friend as an accommodation).
Plaintiff/Respondent, Joe Xuereb appeared on his own behalf.
This case comes on regularly for trial de novo.

Joe Xuereb is sworn and testifies on her own behalf.
Tia Paquan (friend accommodation) is sworn and testifies on the behalf of Aria Razban.

Appellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge: Braden C Woods; Clerk: C. Balanga; Not reported. (608 formally heard in 514)
